result.outcome: Phase B install + all 7 verification steps PASSED. 12 skills are now live-synced via NTFS junctions. Every future `git pull` in dev_test_sync/ instantly updates Claude's skill runtime. Stale-install issue from 531/532 fully resolved.
follow_ups_for_dev: test-pc-worker allowed-tools likely undersized for full check-warning workflow — consider adding Scrape, Snapshot, Wait, Clipboard, Scroll (all exist on test PC's windows-mcp).

runtime/scan-requests.ps1 'git pull failed' message: root-cause the invocation context (may be due to powershell subprocess lacking git config or auth inheritance). The skill's own pull should be robust enough to match git_sync.bat behavior.
